# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/neo4j.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Add lines as we fix more; remove with reason in commit msg.
# Sorted alphabetically. Refresh with bin/refresh-testkit-baseline.
#
# Known excluded:
#   test_address (tests.neo4j.test_summary.TestSummary.test_address)
#     Errors in testkit's own dns_resolve_single helper because GitHub
#     Actions resolves "localhost" to both 127.0.0.1 and ::1; the helper
#     requires single-IP. Test errors during setUp; our backend is never
#     exercised. Re-add once CI is single-stack or the helper tolerates
#     dual.
